" 2>&1)

Bash(awk '/✓ \\[ged\\]|✗ \\[ged\\]/ { name=$3 } /cost=/ && name { gsub\(/.*cost=/, "cost="\); print name, $0; name="" }' /tmp/baseline_run.txt)
Bash(awk '/✓ \\[ged\\]|✗ \\[ged\\]/ { name=$3; status=$1 } /cost=/ && name { gsub\(/.*cost=/, "cost="\); print status, name, $0; name="" }' /tmp/baseline_run.txt)
Bash(awk '/✓ \\[ged\\]|✗ \\[ged\\]/ { name=$3; status=$1 } /cost=/ && name { gsub\(/.*cost=/, "cost="\); print status, name, $0; name="" }' /tmp/strict_run.txt)
Bash(awk '/✓ \\[ged\\]|✗ \\[ged\\]/ { name=$3; status=$1; print status, name }' /tmp/run.txt)
Bash(awk '/--- Category: core_consistency / { in_c=1; next } /--- Category:/ { in_c=0; next } in_c && /✗ \\[ged_consistency\\]/ { print }' /tmp/run.txt)
